summary: Video. A White House and broadcast clip shows President Trump delivering his State of the Union address from the House rostrum, saying that only he and congressional Republicans stand between Americans and an open border. A lower-third shows a number to text 'SOTU' for updates. It is a televised speech with no music or added editing effects.
notable_text: STATE OF THE UNION; TEXT 'SOTU' TO 45470 FOR UPDATES; The WHITE HOUSE
